rule_metadata.name: crypto_vertical_transposition
rule_metadata.description: Alphabet plaintext writtent in transposition cipher

rules.rule_text:
rule crypto_vertical_transposition : info crypto
{
	meta:
		description = "Alphabet plaintext writtent in transposition cipher"

	strings:
		$s_topleft_01 = "AEIMQU"
		$s_topleft_02 = "BFJNRV"
		$s_topleft_03 = "CGKOSW"
		$s_topleft_04 = "DHLPTX"
		$s_topright_01 = "UQMIEA"
		$s_topright_02 = "VRNJFB"
		$s_topright_03 = "WSOKGC"
		$s_topright_04 = "XTPLHD"
		$sl_topleft_01 = "aeimqu"
		$sl_topleft_02 = "bfjnrv"
		$sl_topleft_03 = "cgkosw"
		$sl_topleft_04 = "dhlptx"
		$sl_topright_01 = "umqmiea"
		$sl_topright_02 = "vrnjfb"
		$sl_topright_03 = "wsokgc"
		$sl_topright_04 = "xtplhd"

	condition:
		4 of ( $s_* ) or 4 of ( $sl_* )
}

rule_metadata.name: crypto_vertical_transposition_wide
rule_metadata.description: Alphabet plaintext writtent in transposition cipher

rule_metadata.name: crypto_LM_DES
rule_metadata.description: String constant 'KGS!@#$%' used in LM DES

rules.rule_text:
rule crypto_LM_DES : info crypto
{
	meta:
		description = "String constant 'KGS!@#$%' used in LM DES"

	strings:
		$lm_des = "KGS!@#$%"

	condition:
		all of them
}
